name: cosmos
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        NVIDIA /

      cosmos  

    
      NVIDIA Cosmos is an open platform of world models, datasets, and tools that enables developers to build Physical AI for robots, autonomous vehicles, smart infrastructure, and more.
summary: NVIDIA Cosmos是一个开放的世界模型、数据集和工具平台，帮助开发者构建用于机器人、自动驾驶汽车和智能基础设施等的物理AI系统。

name: CopilotKit
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        CopilotKit /

      CopilotKit  

    
      The Frontend Stack for Agents & Generative UI. React + Angular. Makers of the AG-UI Protocol
summary: CopilotKit 是一个用于构建智能代理和生成式 UI 的前端开发框架，支持 React 和 Angular，值得关注因为它是 AG-UI 协议的创造者。

name: PaddleOCR
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        PaddlePaddle /

      PaddleOCR  

    
      Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.
summary: PaddleOCR 是一个强大的轻量级 OCR 工具包，能够将任何 PDF 或图像文档转换为结构化数据，支持 100 多种语言，为 AI 应用提供高效的文字识别能力。

name: Agent-Reach
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Panniantong /

      Agent-Reach  

    
      Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
summary:
"Agent-Reach 是一个 Python 项目，为 AI 代理提供访问互联网内容的能力，支持读取和搜索 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube 等多个平台，无需支付 API 费用。"  

"该项目值得关注因为它让 AI 代理能直接获取全网信息，突破传统 API 限制，且完全免费。"

name: last30days-skill
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        mvanhorn /

      last30days-skill  

    
      AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
summary: 该项目是一个基于Python的AI代理工具，能自动抓取Reddit、X（推特）、YouTube等多个平台的内容并生成综合摘要，帮助用户快速了解热门话题的最新动态。

name: hermes-agent
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        NousResearch /

      hermes-agent  

    
      The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能随用户需求成长的智能代理项目，值得关注因其具备自适应学习能力，能持续优化用户体验。

name: open-notebook
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        lfnovo /

      open-notebook  

    
      An Open Source implementation of Notebook LM with more flexibility and features
summary: "open-notebook 是一个开源 Notebook LM 实现，提供更灵活的交互式笔记本功能和增强特性。"

name: chopratejas
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        chopratejas /

      headroom  

    
      Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
summary: 该项目是一个Python工具，用于压缩输出、日志、文件和RAG块以减少LLM处理的令牌数量（减少60-95%），同时保持答案准确性，值得关注因其能显著降低LLM使用成本。
